summary: Iteration 11 Testing Complete - DB-level projection, anonymous caching, and sessionStorage cache all working correctly. Backend: 14/14 passed. Frontend: All pages render correctly with optimized payloads and caching.
critical_code_review_comments: - GET /api/auctions?view=list uses MongoDB projection to strip heavy fields at DB layer ✅

- Heavy fields excluded: description, description_en, images_exterior/wheels/bumper/interior, contact_email, contact_phone, vin, power_hp, engine_cc, price_net_eur, price_gross_eur, duration_days, approved_at, views_count, specs, documents, service_history, rejection_reason, translations ✅

- Required fields present: title, make, model, year, mileage_km, fuel, city, country, current_bid_eur, buy_now_eur, bid_count, has_reserve, no_reserve, ends_at, status, featured, vat_status, vat_rate_pct, seller_is_verified_dealer, thumbnails, images ✅
- Authenticated requests: NO public Cache-Control header ✅
- reserve_met NOT leaked for live auctions (returns null) ✅
- Cache written on default query (page=1, status=live, sort=ending_soon, no filters) ✅
- On revisit: instant paint from cache, no 'No results' flash ✅
- /auctions: VAT, FEATURED, No-reserve, With-reserve badges all render ✅
- /auctions: Filtering works (refetches, doesn't use stale cache) ✅
- Homepage: Featured listing + Active auctions section renders ✅
- Homepage: LiveTicker visible with auction items ✅
- /sales: Page renders correctly (empty state - no sold auctions) ✅
- Skip _has_high_value_preauth DB lookup when view=list (saves 1 Mongo round-trip) ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 adds DB-level projection for view=list, anonymous Cache-Control headers on GET /auctions, and frontend sessionStorage cache. All features tested and working. Note: Cloudflare preview edge overrides Cache-Control headers to 'no-store' - test raw headers on localhost:8001. The sessionStorage cache (key=autobid:auctions_default_v1, TTL=60s) only caches the default query (page=1, status=live, sort=ending_soon, no filters). Filtering/search bypasses cache and refetches.

db_projection: MongoDB _LIST_MONGO_PROJECTION excludes heavy fields at DB layer
Required fields for AuctionCard.jsx all present
anonymous_cache_control: Authenticated requests do NOT get public Cache-Control
frontend_session_cache: sessionStorage cache written on default query
Instant paint on revisit (no loading spinner)
frontend_rendering: Homepage with featured listing and active auctions
